ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline
ham.body:
Dear Students,

This is a gentle reminder that the semester project is due on Friday, 30th April 2026. Please make sure to upload your final report and presentation to the university portal before 5:00 PM on that day.

If you have any questions or need assistance with the submission process, feel free to reach out to the faculty or help desk.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Dr. Anjali Sharma
Course Coordinator

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Gift Card for CEO
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

I am Vinay Gupta, the CEO of XYZ Technologies. We have a special partnership agreement with a new client and I need to send them an exclusive gift card as a token of appreciation. I would appreciate it if you could process this request at the earliest.

Please send the gift card details and confirm the transaction via the link below:

<URL>

Kripya jaldi se response dein. Aapke support ke liye shukriya.

Thank you,
Vinay Gupta
CEO, XYZ Technologies
